title: DashTivi+ Don Land for Freetown!
body: Live TV on your phone. Over 9,000 channels — Premier League, Champions League, Nollywood, Hollywood, kids, music, news. No decoder, no dish. Under $6/month. Open tivi.dasuperhub.com and start watching now. Everything dey. Watch am.
image_prompt: A smartphone floating in space showing a vivid football match on screen, with purple and orange light rays emanating from it. Freetown city skyline silhouette at the bottom. Bold text overlay: 'DashTivi+ IS HERE'. Celebratory confetti particles. Dark background with gradient purple (#9D4EDD) to orange (#FF6B35).

title: Your Phone Na Your TV Now
body: Forget decoder. Forget satellite dish. Forget installation man coming to your house. DashTivi+ works straight from your phone browser. Chrome, Safari, anything. Tap 'Add to Home Screen' and it sits right there next to WhatsApp. 2 minutes to set up. Zero MB download. Works on Tecno, Infinix, Samsung, iPhone — any phone with a browser.
image_prompt: Clean product shot of a hand holding a smartphone with DashTivi+ interface visible on screen. Multiple channel thumbnails visible. Purple glow around the phone edges. Text overlay: 'YOUR PHONE = YOUR TV'. Dark minimal background. Modern, premium feel.

title: DStv Premium: $52. DashTivi+: Under $6. Same Football.
body: Let the numbers talk. DStv Premium dey charge $52 a month plus decoder plus dish plus installation fee. DashTivi+ give you 9,000+ channels — more than DStv Premium get — for under $6 a month. No hardware. Just your phone. Same Premier League. Same Champions League. Plus Nollywood, Bollywood, kids channels, music, news. Your pocket go thank you.
image_prompt: Side-by-side comparison infographic. Left side: red background, DStv logo, '$52/month' in large text, crossed-out satellite dish icon, 'decoder required'. Right side: green background with purple accent, DashTivi+ logo, 'Under $6/month' in large text, phone icon with checkmark. Large 'SAVE 90%' badge in center. Clean, bold typography.

title: MATCHDAY Saturday — EPL Live on DASH
body: Saturday Premier League dey here! All the big matches, all live, all on your phone. 12:30 early kick-off, 3:00 afternoon fixtures, 5:30 late match under the lights. No need to fight for seat at the bar. Open DashTivi+ and watch YOUR match. Who you dey support? Drop your prediction!
image_prompt: Dynamic matchday graphic. Three horizontal match cards with placeholder team crests and kick-off times (12:30, 3:00, 5:30). Stadium floodlight glow effect in background. Bold 'MATCHDAY' header text with fire effect. 'LIVE ON DashTivi+' stamp across center in orange (#FF6B35). Dark background with purple (#9D4EDD) accent lines.

title: Champions League Night — Watch Am Live
body: The anthem. The floodlights. The biggest clubs in Europe. Champions League dey live on DashTivi+ tonight. No dodgy streams wey go cut at 89th minute. No blurry quality. Just clean, smooth football from kick-off to final whistle. Open DASH, lean back, and enjoy the magic of European football.
image_prompt: Champions League themed graphic with starfield background in deep blue and gold. DashTivi+ logo integrated subtly. Phone mockup showing a stadium under floodlights. 'UCL LIVE TONIGHT' text in premium gold typography. Purple (#9D4EDD) gradient at bottom. Stars and sparkle effects. Premium, aspirational mood.

title: Friday Movie Night on DashTivi+
body: It's Friday. The week don end. You deserve this. Open DashTivi+, pick your vibe — action, romance, comedy, Nollywood, Hollywood, Bollywood — lie down and press play. New movies dropping every week. Thousands of titles waiting. No ads, no buffering, no wahala. Your Friday night just upgrade.
image_prompt: Cozy movie night scene. A phone propped up on soft pillows showing a movie playing, warm ambient lighting, a bowl of popcorn nearby. Overlay text: 'FRIDAY NIGHT = DASH NIGHT' in stylish font. Film strip elements along the edges. Purple and orange warm gradient glow. Relaxed, inviting atmosphere.

title: Nollywood Boku for DashTivi+
body: Nollywood lovers, this one na for you. Thousands of Nollywood movies and series on DashTivi+. Fresh releases and classics. Drama wey go make you cry at 2AM. Comedy wey go hold your belly. Action wey keep you on edge. Plus dedicated Nollywood channels running 24/7. If you love Nigerian movies, DashTivi+ na your new best friend.
image_prompt: Collage of Nollywood movie poster silhouettes arranged in a creative grid. Bold 'NOLLYWOOD ON DASH' text in orange (#FF6B35). Nigerian green-white-green flag accent. Purple (#9D4EDD) background. Movie clapperboard icon. Phone mockup in center showing a Nollywood drama scene. Vibrant, proud, culturally rich design.

title: Eco Mode — DASH Works Even for 3G
body: Connection slow? No problem. DashTivi+ get Eco Mode wey dey work even for slow 3G. Automatic quality adjustment so you never miss a goal or a plot twist. Whether you dey for Lumley with strong WiFi or Waterloo with one bar of signal, DASH adjust and keep playing. Smooth like butter.
image_prompt: Clean tech feature graphic. Signal bars icon transitioning from 1 bar (3G) to full bars, with a smooth gradient. DashTivi+ logo. Phone showing content playing smoothly with a checkmark. Text: 'ECO MODE — WORKS ON ANY CONNECTION'. Green checkmark accent. Dark background with purple (#9D4EDD) tech-grid pattern.

title: Share DASH, Get Free Weeks
body: The DASH referral program dey live. Share DashTivi+ with a friend — when they sign up and mention your name, you get 1 week FREE. No limit. Bring 4 friends and that's a whole month free. Your friends get football and movies for small money. You get to watch for free. Everybody eats. Start sharing now.
image_prompt: Referral program infographic with 3 steps: (1) share icon with arrow, (2) person signing up with checkmark, (3) gift box opening with '1 WEEK FREE' text. Connected by dotted line. Bold banner: 'BRING 4 FRIENDS = 1 MONTH FREE' in orange (#FF6B35). Purple (#9D4EDD) background. Clean, simple iconography. Exciting but not cluttered.

title: How to Set Up DashTivi+ in 2 Minutes
body: Setting up DashTivi+ easy pass. Step 1: Open your phone browser. Step 2: Go to tivi.dasuperhub.com. Step 3: Tap 'Add to Home Screen'. Step 4: Enter your access code. Step 5: Start watching. No Play Store download. No big app taking your storage. Works on any phone — Android, iPhone, Tecno, Infinix. 2 minutes and you dey live.
image_prompt: 5-panel step-by-step tutorial graphic. Each panel shows a phone mockup: (1) browser icon, (2) URL typed in address bar, (3) 'Add to Home Screen' button with red arrow, (4) access code entry screen, (5) live content playing with green checkmark. Numbered with purple (#9D4EDD) circles. Clean white and dark design. Header: 'SETUP IN 2 MINUTES'.

title: Weekend Entertainment Sorted
body: Your weekend plan done. Saturday: EPL from morning to night — early kick-off, afternoon fixtures, late match. Evening: movie marathon, pick your vibe. Sunday: more EPL, La Liga, then series catch-up. All on your phone. All on DashTivi+. The only decision you need to make is what to watch first.
image_prompt: Weekend schedule graphic split into Saturday and Sunday sections. Saturday: football icons with match times, movie icon for evening. Sunday: more football, series icon for evening. Dark background with purple (#9D4EDD) section dividers. Orange (#FF6B35) timestamps. 'YOUR WEEKEND ON DASH' as bold header. Checkmarks on everything. Calendar/planner aesthetic.

title: Kids Content — Safe Entertainment for Your Pikin Dem
body: DashTivi+ get a dedicated Kids section. Cartoons, Disney, educational content — all safe for your little ones. Put your pikin in front of DashTivi+ Kids and let dem enjoy while you get some peace. No ads, no random YouTube videos. Just proper kids channels running 24/7. Family Plan at SLE 40/month gives you 3 screens — dad dey watch football, mum dey watch Nollywood, pikin dem dey watch cartoons. Peace for the house.
image_prompt: Bright, colorful kids content graphic. Cartoon characters silhouettes, stars, and balloons on a playful purple background. Phone showing animated content. Text: 'KIDS SECTION — SAFE & FUN' in round, friendly font. Small icons: cartoon bear, star, rainbow. Orange (#FF6B35) accent elements. Family-friendly, warm, inviting design.

title: DASH Dey Look for Agents for Freetown
body: Want to make real money every week? DASH dey recruit agents across Freetown. You earn 25% commission on every signup, get free permanent DashTivi+ access, track your earnings on your dashboard, and get paid every Monday. The product sell itself — show someone football on your phone and watch dem sign up. DM us with your name, area, and WhatsApp number.
image_prompt: Bold recruitment poster. Dark background. 'WE'RE HIRING — DASH AGENTS' in large white text at top. 4 benefit icons: money bag (25% commission), phone (free access), chart (dashboard), calendar (weekly payout). Orange (#FF6B35) and purple (#9D4EDD) two-tone design. '20 SPOTS — FREETOWN' urgency bar at bottom. Professional but energetic. DashTivi+ logo.

title: Match Pass — SLE 2 for 24 Hours of Everything
body: Big match tonight but you nor ready to commit? Match Pass dey for you. SLE 2 — the price of sachet water — and you get full access to all 9,000+ channels for 24 hours. Football, movies, series, kids, everything. Try am for one match. After you see the quality, you go come back for Weekly. That's the DASH guarantee.
image_prompt: Product pricing card for Match Pass. Ticket-style design with perforated edge effect. 'MATCH PASS — SLE 2' in large bold text. '24 HOURS — FULL ACCESS' subtext. Football icon and film reel icon. 'Price of sachet water' callout bubble. Purple (#9D4EDD) gradient background. Orange (#FF6B35) price highlight. Premium ticket aesthetic.

title: The Flex Na the App on the Phone
body: POV: Your padis dey argue about who go pay for DStv this month. Meanwhile, you dey lie down for bed watching Champions League on your phone for less than $6. The flex nor be the phone. The flex na the app on the phone. 9,000 channels. Every match. Every movie. Under six dollars. DashTivi+ — while they dey stress, you dey watch.
image_prompt: Meme-style split image. Top half: stressed person looking at bills with 'DStv $52' overlay, red tint. Bottom half: relaxed person in bed watching phone with content playing, purple glow from screen, confident smile, 'DashTivi+ $6' overlay, green/purple tint. 'THE FLEX IS THE APP' bold text at bottom. Shareable social media format.

title: Pay the Way You Like — Orange Money, Afrimoney, Cash
body: DashTivi+ easy to pay for. Orange Money? We get am. Afrimoney? We get am. Cash to a DASH agent near you? We get am too. No credit card needed. No bank account needed. Just pick your plan, pick your payment method, and start watching. Simple. The way things suppose be.
image_prompt: Payment methods showcase graphic. Three payment icons arranged horizontally: Orange Money logo, Afrimoney logo, and a cash/hand icon. Connected by arrows pointing to a phone showing DashTivi+. Text: 'PAY YOUR WAY' in bold. Dark background with subtle purple (#9D4EDD) gradient. Trust badges and security lock icon. Clean, trustworthy design.

title: La Liga, Serie A, AFCON — Not Just EPL
body: Yes, DashTivi+ get all Premier League. But that's not all. La Liga with Barcelona and Real Madrid. Serie A with the Italian giants. AFCON qualifiers. Bundesliga. Ligue 1. UFC. Boxing. Tennis. Cricket. If there's a sport playing somewhere in the world, chances are DASH dey show am. Over 9,000 channels mean you never run out of sports.
image_prompt: Multi-sport showcase graphic. Multiple sport icons arranged in a dynamic circle: football, basketball, tennis, boxing gloves, cricket bat. League logos placeholders for EPL, La Liga, Serie A, AFCON. 'MORE THAN JUST EPL' bold text in center. Purple (#9D4EDD) and orange (#FF6B35) accent colors. Dark background with stadium lighting effect. Global sports energy.

title: No Contract. No Lock-in. Cancel Anytime.
body: DashTivi+ nor dey tie you down. No 12-month contract. No cancellation fee. No hidden charges. Buy a week, enjoy a week. Buy a month, enjoy a month. If you want stop, just stop. No phone call to cancel. No form to fill. When you ready to come back, we go dey here. That's how confident we are in the product.
image_prompt: Freedom/flexibility themed graphic. Broken chain icon symbolizing no lock-in. Checkmark list: 'No contract', 'No cancellation fee', 'No hidden charges'. Open padlock icon. Phone with DashTivi+ showing freely. Text: 'YOUR TERMS. YOUR PACE.' in clean white font. Dark purple (#9D4EDD) background. Orange (#FF6B35) checkmarks. Liberating, trustworthy feel.

title: Bollywood, K-Drama, Turkish Series — World Entertainment
body: DashTivi+ nor be only football and Nollywood. Bollywood movies with the music and the drama? We get am. Korean drama wey go hook you for season after season? Dey there. Turkish series wey your wife go love? Plenty. Channels from India, Middle East, Asia, Europe, Latin America. The whole world dey on your phone. Time to explore.
image_prompt: Global entertainment collage. World map with glowing pins at India, South Korea, Turkey, Latin America, Europe. Entertainment icons floating from each region — Bollywood dancer silhouette, K-drama heart, Turkish mosque silhouette. 'WORLD ENTERTAINMENT — ONE APP' text. Colorful but cohesive with purple (#9D4EDD) base and orange (#FF6B35) accents. Cultural richness without stereotypes.

title: News Channels From Around the World
body: Stay informed with DashTivi+. BBC, CNN, Al Jazeera, African news channels, Sky News, France 24 — all live, all on your phone. Whether you want world news, African affairs, business updates, or local coverage, DASH get the channel. No more waiting for the 9 o'clock bulletin. News dey live 24/7 on your phone whenever you want am.
image_prompt: News channels showcase. Clean grid layout with placeholder boxes for news channel logos (BBC, CNN, Al Jazeera, Sky News, France 24). Globe icon in center with signal waves. Text: 'WORLD NEWS — LIVE 24/7' in professional typography. Dark background with blue and purple (#9D4EDD) accent. News ticker bar at bottom. Authoritative, informed, trustworthy aesthetic.
